scripts.desktop: npm run build && npm run electron:sync-icon && electron electron/main.mjs
scripts.desktop:dev: DATAFACTORY_ELECTRON_DEV=1 concurrently -k "npm run electron:sync-icon && vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8001 && electron electron/main.mjs"
scripts.desktop:package: npm run build && npm run electron:sync-icon && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dir --publish never
